# fly_app (Resource)

Manages a Fly.io application. Import using the app name: `terraform import fly_app.example my-app`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "fly_app" "example" {
  name     = "my-example-app"
  org_slug = "personal"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the application. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.
- `org_slug` (String) The slug of the organization the app belongs to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

### Optional

- `network` (String) The network to attach the app to. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

### Read-Only

- `app_url` (String) The URL of the application.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the application.
- `status` (String) The current status of the application.
